overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's neon-lit urban downtown. The player character moves from an outdoor NCPD plaza past holographic advertisements, crosses a street, ascends stairs into an indoor market, and enters an elevator.

events.description: turns left at the MARKET 24 intersection

agents.ego_description: walking through the NCPD plaza area, turning left at the market intersection

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange jacket walking past the NCPD structure

entered.detail: futuristic police station with blue and orange geometric panels and NCPD signage
illuminated green and white market sign suspended over the walkway
tropical palm tree in concrete planter
large holographic advertisement on distant building facade

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a semi-covered urban plaza beneath an elevated highway structure. The NCPD building dominates the left side with its distinctive blue and orange geometric architecture. The camera moves forward through moderate pedestrian traffic and turns left at the MARKET 24 intersection, passing tropical palm trees and neon signage.

events.description: passes an NPC smoking near a bench and trash can

agents.ego_description: walking along the commercial street past the MASALA STUDIOS building and digital billboards

notable_agents.action: person with mohawk and red patterned pants smoking near a green bench

entered.detail: neon sign for MASALA STUDIOS on red building facade
vertical digital billboard displaying PASSION advertisement with stylized face
large rust-colored industrial support columns with steam vents

segments.scene_description: Moving into a narrower commercial street lined with neon storefronts, the camera passes the MASALA STUDIOS building and a prominent PASSION billboard. An NPC with distinctive mohawk and red pants stands smoking near a bench. Large orange industrial pillars become visible in the distance as the MARKET 24 sign recedes behind.

events.description: begins crossing the yellow striped crosswalk with WAIT markings
finishes crossing and approaches the illuminated concrete stairs

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the yellow crosswalk and approaching the stairway entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in blue plaid shirt crossing the street ahead of the camera

entered.detail: broad pedestrian crossing with bold yellow stripes and red WAIT text
wide concrete staircase with illuminated railings leading upward to upper level

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide intersection where the camera crosses a prominent yellow-striped crosswalk. Pedestrians in blue plaid shirts and casual wear cross in various directions. After crossing, the camera approaches a wide concrete staircase with illuminated railings leading upward, while the orange industrial pillars fade into the left background.

scene_state.functional_zone: illuminated stairway leading to elevated market

events.description: reaches the top of the stairs and enters the indoor WAGAMI MARKET area

agents.ego_description: climbing the illuminated concrete stairs toward the upper level market entrance

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in purple top and pink backpack descending the stairs

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in purple and white graffiti tags and street art
red vertical fabric banner with WAGAMI MARKET text in black
illuminated food vendor stall with steam rising and hanging lanterns

segments.scene_description: Ascending the wide concrete staircase with illuminated railings, the camera passes graffiti-covered walls on the right. A pedestrian in a purple top descends the stairs in the opposite direction. At the top, the scene transitions into the WAGAMI MARKET entrance, marked by a red banner and steam-emitting food stalls with warm lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor food market with vendor stalls and metal shutters

events.description: approaches and enters the elevator at the end of the market corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through the WAGAMI MARKET past food vendors and metal shutters toward the elevator

notable_agents.action: vendor in red apron working at the food counter preparing orders

entered.detail: closed metal security gates with mesh grating and orange trim
elevator doors with illuminated call button panel and directional signage

segments.scene_description: Walking through the enclosed WAGAMI MARKET, the camera passes food vendors and customers seated at counters. The environment features industrial metal shutters and concrete flooring. The camera moves toward an elevator entrance at the end of the corridor, passing by a vendor in a red apron working at a food stall.

events.description: enters the elevator and the doors close behind
elevator begins ascending as indicated by the floor display changing

agents.ego_description: standing in the elevator watching the news screens as it ascends to upper floors

entered.detail: wood-paneled elevator walls with brass trim and warm lighting
array of four video monitors displaying news broadcast with female anchor in pink
vertical brass panel with illuminated floor indicators showing upward movement

segments.scene_description: The final segment takes place inside a wood-paneled elevator with brass trim. The camera faces an array of four video screens displaying a news broadcast featuring a female anchor. The elevator control panel shows the floor indicators changing as the elevator ascends, leaving the market area behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a sprawling urban plaza into the intimate, enclosed spaces of a high-rise market and elevator. It begins beneath an elevated highway by the blue and orange architecture of an NCPD building, moving through pedestrian traffic and past neon signage at the Market 24 intersection. As the camera enters a narrower commercial street lined with billboards and storefronts, it crosses a yellow-striped intersection before ascending a wide concrete staircase flanked by graffiti-covered walls. The scene then transitions from the open city air into the warm, steam-filled environment of the Wagami Market, passing food vendors and industrial shutters. Finally, the movement concludes as the camera enters a wood-paneled elevator, shifting from the bustling market corridor to a confined space facing news broadcasts on a bank of screens.
